document_title: PMI App Brand Pack - LLM Context Format

company_name.notes: Publisher shown in the available Flipsnack page shell.

visible_wordmark_text.case_and_punctuation_rule: Preserve lowercase spelling and trailing period when referencing the visible wordmark.

visible_tagline.case_and_punctuation_rule: Preserve lowercase wording exactly as observed.

source_policy.hard_rule: Use only information directly supported by the available PMI source. Do not invent PMI brand facts.
source_policy.unknown_value_rule: When a value is unknown, keep it null and describe it as not specified in the available source. Do not fill gaps from memory, unrelated PMI sites, or the reference PDF.
source_policy.reference_pdf_rule: The attached Cherry Bridge reference PDF influenced presentation structure only. Do not use its brand names, colors, fonts, gradients, or wording as PMI content.

visible_elements.name: orange_angular_icon
visible_elements.production_rule: Use official PMI vector artwork for release assets. Do not trace or redraw the preview.

visible_elements.name: lowercase_wordmark
visible_elements.production_rule: Preserve exact visible text styling when describing the wordmark; use official artwork in production.

app_implications: Keep a high-contrast lockup zone for visible brand moments.
Do not redraw the preview logo for release assets.
Avoid color or value substitutions until official tokens are obtained.
logo_system.production_rule: This LLM context pack is a source-constrained design handoff scaffold, not a substitute for official logo files or full PMI brand-guide rules.

color_system.global_warning: Exact PMI HEX, RGB, CMYK, PMS, and contrast values were not available. Do not create production design tokens from observed preview colors or PDF approximation fills.

roles.notes: Observed as black cover field; exact official value not specified.
Observed as white wordmark; exact official value not specified.
Observed as orange angular icon/tagline/accent; exact official value not specified.

prototype_approximations.reason_values_omitted: Omitted to prevent an outside model from treating presentation approximations as official PMI color specifications.
prototype_approximations.allowed_use: conversation-only mockups with explicit non-production labeling

gradients.rule: Do not infer PMI gradients from the reference PDF or from approximate cover colors.

app_usage_guidance.guidance: Use the black/orange/white identity for launch, sign-in, hero, and brand transition screens only when values are official or explicitly labeled as prototype approximations. Keep body UI quieter than the cover moment.
Orange appears as icon/tagline/accent. It may be used for key actions only after official contrast values are validated.
Use plain white or neutral surfaces for long tasks, forms, and tables. Avoid heavy black backgrounds for dense operational workflows.

guidance: Do not infer the complete typography system from the cover image.
Use official PMI typefaces when obtained.
Until official fonts are obtained, keep any working app prototype typography explicitly labeled as non-brand fallback.
typography.fallback_note: Any fallback font shown in the visual PDF was a usability placeholder, not a PMI typeface specification.

app_use: Use the angular brand motif only as a restrained accent or transition, and only when official assets are available.
Use official files for icons and marks when available.
Do not trace the preview for release assets.

imagery.rule: Do not infer image style from unrelated PMI sources.

accessibility.app_implication: Build the app with accessible product defaults now; replace visual placeholders only when official PMI typography, palette, imagery, and accessibility requirements are obtained.

guidance.rule: Use the visible black/orange/white identity as a brand moment, with official assets and official color values before release.
Keep compact. Avoid unverified logo variants or redrawn marks.
Orange may act as the brand accent only after contrast is validated and official color values are obtained.
Use neutral surfaces and clear typography. Official fonts are not specified in the available source.
Create placeholder tokens only; leave values null until official specs are obtained.

do: Use the exact visible name styling pmi. when referencing the visible wordmark.
Preserve the tagline wording: the property management people.
Treat orange, black, and white as observed visual roles only until exact specs are obtained.
Use official logo artwork for production app assets.
Keep unavailable brand specs clearly marked in design tickets.
dont: Do not publish approximate fills as PMI HEX/RGB/CMYK/PMS values.
Do not invent typefaces, spacing, clearspace, gradients, icons, or imagery rules.
Do not redraw the preview logo for app release builds.
Do not mix this visible identity with unrelated or legacy marks without source support.
Do not overuse the dark cover treatment for dense functional screens.

usable_now: Publication identity: PMI Brand Style Guide - 071525 / Property Management Inc.
Visible cover lockup reference: pmi. + tagline + orange angular mark.
use_with_caution: App mockups may use approximated black/orange/white fills for conversation only. Label them as non-production.
needed_before_release: Official logo files and usage rules.
Official color specifications and accessibility-confirmed UI tokens.
Official typefaces, iconography, imagery, and motion/graphic rules.

must_not_do: Do not assign HEX, RGB, CMYK, PMS, or gradient values to PMI colors unless supplied by a later official source.
Do not name PMI typefaces, font sizes, or hierarchy rules unless supplied by a later official source.
Do not use the Cherry Bridge reference PDF's colors, gradients, typography, or wording as PMI content.
Do not treat the visual PDF's approximation fills as official PMI colors.
Do not invent logo clearspace, minimum size, one-color usage, icon style, photography style, tone rules, or accessibility rules.
must_do: Use null for unknown structured values.
Use the phrase 'not specified in the available source' for unavailable PMI details.
Separate observed facts from app implications.
Mark app implications as inferred from visible usage only when they are not direct PMI rules.
Require official source verification before production implementation.

pmi_source_material_used: Flipsnack publication page shell: title, publisher, publication date.
Visible cover preview: orange angular icon, lowercase pmi. wordmark, orange tagline, black cover field, Brand Book / Style Guide label.
Public full-view page extraction: cookie/banner shell only; no reliable interior page text, official color values, or typeface rules were exposed in the available extraction workflow.
reference_pdf_usage: Attached Cherry Bridge guide used only as visual structure benchmark: section titles, spacing, swatches, callouts, footers, and page numbers.
No reference brand names, palette values, fonts, gradients, or wording were used as PMI content.
source_notes.final_status: Source-constrained brand pack; not a substitute for complete official PMI brand guide files.
